name: HRC_SEM_PERSONS
description: This table contains the attributes of a person.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of the person table

columns.Name: URI
columns.Comments: This contains the unique URI for the person.

columns.Name: IS_INTERNAL
columns.Comments: Indicates if a person is internal or external.  Value is 0 for external candidates and 1 for internal cadidates.

columns.Name: PREFIX
columns.Comments: This column contains teh prefix of the person.

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the first name of the person

columns.Name: MIDDLE_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the middle name of the person

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the last name of the person.

columns.Name: FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the full name of the person (First + Middle + last)

columns.Name: SUFFIX
columns.Comments: This column contains teh suffix of the person.

columns.Name: WILLING_TO_TRAVEL
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the person is willing to travel.

columns.Name: JOB_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This column indicates the job level of the person

columns.Name: JOB_SCHEDULE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the job schedule of the person.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the employee status of the person.

columns.Name: LOCATION_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the geography id for the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the country id for the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the state id for the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_CITY_ID
columns.Comments: This contains the city id for the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: This contains the postal code for the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LEAF_NAME
columns.Comments: This contains the leaf name of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_FQN
columns.Comments: This contains the fully qualified name of the location.

columns.Name: TOTAL_YEARS_EXPERIENCE
columns.Comments: This column contains the total years of experience.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: This contains the address line 1 of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: This contains the address line 2 of the location.

columns.Name: REHIRE_ELIGIBILITY
columns.Comments: Whether the employee is recommended for rehire (can have 3 values)

columns.Name: LOCATION_LATITUDE
columns.Comments: This contains the latitude of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: This contains the longitude of the location.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the status of the indexing event.

columns.Name: IS_ERROR
columns.Comments: This column indicates if there is error in the indexing event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column contains the error message of the indexing event.

columns.Name: INDEXING_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the indexing event id.

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the batch id.

columns.Name: OPT_IN
columns.Comments: True if candidate has opted-in for marketing emails

columns.Name: UNSUBSCRIBED
columns.Comments: True if candidate has unsubscribed from marketing emails

columns.Name: REFERRED
columns.Comments: True if candidate was referred to any job

columns.Name: ENDORSED
columns.Comments: True if candidate was endorsed for any job

columns.Name: PROSPECT
columns.Comments: True if candidate is a prospect for any open job

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Name of the source that resulted in this candidate

columns.Name: MEDIUM
columns.Comments: Name of the medium that resulted in this candidate

columns.Name: WILLING_TO_RELOCATE
columns.Comments: True if candidate is willing to relocate

columns.Name: PROFILE_LAST_UPDATED
columns.Comments: Last time this candidate profile was updated

columns.Name: LAST_INTERACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Last time this candidate had an interaction

columns.Name: LAST_CAMPAIGN_DATE
columns.Comments: Last time this candidate was sent a campaign

columns.Name: ACTIVE_CANDIDATE
columns.Comments: True if candidate has an acive application on any open job

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
